---
title: "König-geliebt-von-Gottheit-Formel"
---
```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button onclick="setZoom(0.9)">A−</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1)">A</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1.2)">A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', scale);
  localStorage.setItem('site-zoom', scale);
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('site-zoom');
  if (saved) {
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', saved);
  }
});
</script>
```

[König](../slots/koenig.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-k-nig} [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gottheit} ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/04_Koenig-geliebt-von-Gottheit-Formel/01_mry/0001_mry_01.png){.glyph} *mry*



## Übersetzung

[König](../slots/koenig.qmd){.slot-link .slot-k-nig} geliebt von [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.slot-link .slot-gottheit}

## Schreibvarianten

::: {.glyphvariants-block}

*mry*:

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/04_Koenig-geliebt-von-Gottheit-Formel/01_mry/0001_mry_01.png){.glyph}

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/04_Koenig-geliebt-von-Gottheit-Formel/01_mry/0010_mry_02.png){.glyph}

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/04_Koenig-geliebt-von-Gottheit-Formel/01_mry/0020_mry_03.png){.glyph}

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/04_Koenig-geliebt-von-Gottheit-Formel/01_mry/0030_mry_04.png){.glyph}

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/04_Koenig-geliebt-von-Gottheit-Formel/01_mry/0040_mry_05.png){.glyph}

- ![](/assets/glyphs/01_Textgattung/04_Koenig-geliebt-von-Gottheit-Formel/01_mry/0050_mry_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup>


:::





```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
  const footer = document.getElementById("footer-nav");

  function onScroll() {
    const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;

    if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY && currentScrollY > 80) {
      footer.classList.add("footer-hidden");
    } else {
      footer.classList.remove("footer-hidden");
    }

    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
})();
</script>
```
